title: Glenda Rita Sing The Movie Greats
description: The Silver Starlets return to the Rotunda after last year's sell-out run, as they take you on a musical journey of their favourite movies throughout the decades! Glenda & Rita are two actresses from the Golden Era of cinema, immortalised in black & white and struggling to find work in this brutal, unforgiving technicolour world. They will take you on a journey, as they sing the songs from more of their favourite movies throughout the years, from 'A Star Is Born' to 'Spice World', and 'James Bond' to ''Priscilla Queen of the Desert'. From the award-winning musical comedy duo that brought you 'A History of Horror', 'Glenda & Rita: Live' and 'I'm Dreaming of a Black & White Christmas', this musical soirée is not to be missed!
